Gotcha! How about the wheels, i got the dusk and dawn and arachne, should i get horla and winkles wheel as well?

Exalt (ults) you level them to 3 and dont touch them until you are comfortable with that unit
Command cards (the cards you draw and such) you can level them to 3 and up to 5 (6 only if they are a key card, dont worry about it for now)
so those are your current stop points for a long wihle
put the spider looking wheel (tarot card) on Arachne and all other units just give them the brown wheels
This is really a great tip
the most scarce resource is a red gem
they are more valuable THAN THE DAMN PULL CURRENCY
Brown wheels, you mean the r ones?
yes
Any specific brown wheel or just anything
I assume the red gem is used to upgrade skills?
uuuuh, these 4 are goated, all other are also really good

yeah for Exalt past 3 costs 1 red gem
as for skills its past 5
(max is 6 for both)

there is also another limited resource that looks like a starfish, but its not borderline unobtainable like the red gem
This is noted. I have these

120 small shards are 1 gem
30 mimicgems are 1 boss mat
Sheeesshh. How about the enlighten men item i got from the exchange, should i just save it?
uh what
this?
Yep that one
you can just hoard them for a long while
always buy it and Loop thing from the monthly shop (also the pulls but those things take priority)
they are UNIVERSAL DUPERS
absolutely godlike
and only use them on limited units
NEVER on standards or the welfare trio, aurita, aigis and erica
So no units worthy of duoes as of yet?
no there are some, but if you are able to clear without them you wont need to use them
just hoard them

does anyone have any good teams for 8-13? i've failed at it like 3 times in a row lol

Her 1 cost card applies final verdict which works like an execution threshold, once enemy hp reaches the value covered by final verdict, it pops 
Using it also gives you Guiding strings, which consumes some hp, increased final verdict dealt for the battle, and gives you a weaver stack 
If you use arachnes exalt after annihilating a card/in ultra turn, when an ally uses a card she'll consume a weaver stack to do her pursuit which applies a lot of final verdict on 1 target
Her buffs scale realm mastery and final verdict scales on atk and dmg amp
Can read talent 1 for that<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

The problem is Ghelot and Helot compete for similar units and gear. 

Ghelot / 24 is one direction you can go (24 is getting a lot of Caro buffs soon).  You can put Ogier or Alva here. Then you need one more unit (Hameln is good, Doresain support...

You also have the classic Ghelot / Horla (if you get horla) or you could sub for arachne (but then you hurt your Helot team).

## General Guide

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
